payload.subject: Elizabeth McCutcheon b. ~1748 Scotland
payload.directive: Find a primary source confirming Elizabeth McCutcheon's marriage to William Maxwell b.1740.

acceptance_criteria: At least one primary or secondary source naming both spouses
Exact source citation with a resolvable URL

result.description: Locate a marriage record for William Maxwell (b.1740) and Elizabeth McCutcheon.
result.hypothesis_tested: William Maxwell b.1740 married Elizabeth McCutcheon.
result.why_this_matters: Confirms the maternal surname entering the Maxwell line for the client's pedigree.
result.what_we_did_and_result: Searched ScotlandsPeople OPR marriages for Kirkcudbrightshire 1760-1772 and found a 1765 banns entry naming both parties.
result.how_results_affect_goal: Confirms the McCutcheon connection at good confidence; the maternal line can be extended.
result.what_we_did_with_results: Recorded a marriage event_assertion and a spouse_assertion with the OPR citation.
result.next_step: Trace Elizabeth McCutcheon's parents in the same parish registers.

steps.found: OPR banns 1765: William Maxwell & Elizabeth McCutcheon, parish of Buittle.

result.verdict_reason: Parish banns entry names both parties in the expected place and window.
next_directions_suggested: Search Buittle OPR births for Elizabeth McCutcheon's baptism
Look for a McCutcheon father in the 1750s parish records

review.review_notes: Source resolves, query reproducible, both spouses named. Meets acceptance criteria.

payout._note: Product-layer economics (The Probable Pedigree). NOT part of the neutral MAXGEN standard.
